SEARCH
Module storm.core
Package st.orm.core.template.impl

Class TemplateMetrics

java.lang.Object
st.orm.core.template.impl.TemplateMetrics
All Implemented Interfaces:
TemplateMetricsMXBean
public final class TemplateMetrics extends Object implements TemplateMetricsMXBean
Singleton JMX MBean for SQL template cache metrics.

Registered as st.orm:type=TemplateMetrics in the platform MBean server. All SqlTemplateImpl instances share this single metrics collector. If JMX registration fails, metrics are still collected in-memory and accessible via getInstance().

Since:
1.8

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static TemplateMetrics getInstance()
      Returns the singleton metrics instance.

    • registerCacheSize

      public void registerCacheSize(int size)
      Registers the configured template cache size.
      Parameters:
      size - the template cache size.

    • startRequest

      public TemplateMetrics.Request startRequest()
      Start measuring one request. Call TemplateMetrics.Request.hit() or TemplateMetrics.Request.miss() once you know, then call TemplateMetrics.Request.close() in a finally block.
